case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS CRIGHTON, MARYANN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,525.52 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CRIGHTON, MARYANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-11-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-01-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLTF'S REQUEST TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO $1851.52 IS GRANTED.
